intended_use: The ScreenPoint TransparaTM system is intended for use as a concurrent reading aid for physicians interpreting screening mammograms from compatible FFDM systems, to identify regions suspicious for bre
intended_use_full: The ScreenPoint TransparaTM system is intended for use as a concurrent reading aid for physicians interpreting screening mammograms from compatible FFDM systems, to identify regions suspicious for breast cancer and assess their likelihood of malignancy.
ground_truth: biopsy-proven examples of breast cancer, benign lesions, and normal tissue (used for algorithm training); test dataset was not used for training and included mammograms from five manufacturers
other_metrics: Algorithm performance improved in comparison to Transpara 1.3.0 for four manufacturers already cleared; similar performance achieved for newly supported Fujifilm modality
